Title: Enacts the NYS ratepayer protection nuclear moratorium act
Summary: Enacts the "NYS ratepayer protection nuclear moratorim act" under which certain state funds and subsidies are prohibited from being expended for new nuclear power facilities and related entities; creates a nuclear assessment task force.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to enacting the "NYS ratepayer protection nuclear moratorium act"; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
